panels.description: Wide shot: The narrator stands in a desolate London street near a park, looking toward a faint, ominous haze of smoke rising over the buildings in the distance. The atmosphere is hazy and oppressive.

bubbles.text: The voice grew stronger, drifting from the direction of Regent's Park.

panels.description: Close-up: The narrator's weary, haggard face. His eyes are sunken, reflecting profound loneliness and exhaustion. Empty streets stretch out in the blurred background.

bubbles.text: Why am I alone in this city of the dead?

panels.description: Medium shot: The narrator inside a ransacked, dusty public-house, reaching for biscuits and cheese. Sunlight filters through broken glass, highlighting the grit of the abandoned bar.

bubbles.text: Thirst and hunger drove me into the remains of a public-house.

panels.description: Wide shot: The narrator at the edge of Regent's Park at sunset. In the far distance, the hood of a Martian giant looms over the trees, silhouetted against a deep orange sky.

bubbles.text: There, amidst the trees, the source of the howling.

panels.description: Medium shot: A desperate dog clutching raw meat dashes past the narrator, pursued by a pack of snarling mongrels. The narrator steps back into the shadows of a terrace.

bubbles.text: The wild things of the city scramble for the spoils of a fallen world.

panels.description: Wide shot: A dark, twisted wreck of a mechanical handling-machine lying abandoned in the twilight. The scene is gloomy and foreboding, with sharp, jagged metal silhouettes.

bubbles.text: A wrecked machine, discarded like a broken toy.
